title: Hour View in My Work?
excerpt: Is there a way to view hours assigned to each item on the “my work” page? Our team needs to update hours assigned to the time they realistically spent on them but it can be cumbersome to sift through tasks. Is there a wa…

posts.author: DanielaHuber (Daniela Huber)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to view hours assigned to each item on the “my work” page? Our team needs to update hours assigned to the time they realistically spent on them but it can be cumbersome to sift through tasks. Is there a way to have hours show on the My Work page in line with each item?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @DanielaHuber,

I am afraid the ability to add more columns isn’t currently supported in my work. Please add your vote to the existing feature request so we can get this on our future roadmap!
